homepage.title: Bilz Vibration Technology AG - Ihr Experte für Schwingungstechnik
homepage.description: Ihr Experte für Schwingungsisolierung und Maschinenaufstelltechnik. Für jedes Schwingungsproblem finden wir eine Lösung. Made in Germany
homepage.text_excerpt:
Bilz Vibration Technology AG - Ihr Experte für Schwingungstechnik
Suche
Kontakt
Smartdesk
Wie können wir
ihnen helfen?
Kontaktieren Sie
unseren Service
Menü
Focused on Partnership
Schwingungsfrei bedeutet Präzision und Qualität
Die Anforderungen an Konstruktion und Betrieb von Maschinen und Anlagen nehmen kontinuierlich zu. Moderne Maschinengenerationen sind um ein Vielfaches leistungsfähiger, etwa bei der Bearbeitungsgeschwindigkeit
oder der Fertigungspräzision. Um hier optimale Ergebnisse zu erzielen, ist es notwendig, übertragene Schwingungen und Körperschall zu reduzieren.
Wir ermöglichen Technologieführern der Industrie und Forschung das schwingungsfreie Betreiben ihrer Anlagen – für sichere, schnelle Arbeitsprozesse und präzise Ergebnisse.
Die Bilz Vibration Technology AG ist Marktführer auf dem Gebiete der
Schwingungsisolierung
und Schwingungstechnik und damit Ihr Experte für
schwingungsisolierte Maschinenaufstellung
. Unser Familienunternehmen wurde 1985 gegründet. Der Firmensitz befindet sich in Leonberg bei Stuttgart.
Mehr über uns
Schleifmaschine Junker Jupiter 500 – isoliert über eine Gussplattform und ein Membranluftfedersystem BiAir®-ED aus Aluminiumguss inklusive einer mechanisch pneumatischen Niveauregelung MPN-PVM
Service
Wir sind Systemlieferant und Projektpartner mit Rundum-Service. Bei uns erhalten Sie alles aus einer Hand.
Downloads
Wir versorgen Sie mit allen Informationen, die Sie brauchen. Hier finden Sie technische Datenblätter, Kataloge und Broschüren zum Download.
Messen und News
Hier finden Sie unsere aktuellen Nachrichten, die neuesten Produktentwicklungen, unsere Messetermine und Interessantes aus unserem Familienunternehmen...
Produkte
Unerreicht große Produktpalette
Bilz Produkte finden
Isolierplatten
Schwingungsdämpfende Isolierplatten von Bilz - die bewährte wirtschaftliche Lösung in vielen Industriebereichen.
Mehr erfahren
Nivellierelemente
Nivellierelemente sind wartungsfreie Maschinenfüße zur schwingungsisolierten Maschinenaufstellung. Die Bilz Maschinenfüße bilden die perfekte Kombination zur präzisen Niveaueinstellung und der Isolierung von störenden Schwingungen.
Mehr erfahren
Präzisionskeilschuhe
Bilz Keilschuhe für Maschinenbau, Industrie und Forschung ermöglichen die präzise Nivellierung von Maschinen, insbesondere bei hohen Belastungen.
Mehr erfahren
Horizontalelemente
Für Maschinen mit starker Horizontalschubkraft oder zur seitlichen Verkettung und Fixierung.
Mehr erfahren
Luftfedern
Luftfedern dienen der hochwirksamen Schwingungsisolierung und Körperschallisolierung für unterschiedlichste Maschinentypen, optische und elektronische Geräte, Laseranlagen sowie Fahrzeug-, Motor- und Getriebeprüfstände.
Mehr erfahren
Mechanische Niveauregelsysteme
Leistungsfähige Niveauregelung für Luftfederisolatoren in Verbindung mit höchster Niveaukonstanz.
Mehr erfahren
Elektronische Niveauregel­systeme
Elektronisch-pneumatische Niveauregelsysteme zur Kombination mit BiAir® Membranluftfedern, für optimierte Positionsge

about.text:
About us - Bilz - your expert for vibration isolation - Bilz Vibration Technology AG
Search
Contact
Smartdesk
How can we
help you?
Contact our
service department
Menu
Contents on this page:
Please select
Our contact persons
Company
Facts and figures
Our customers
Company
Our family business rests on these three pillars
We are technical outfitters for mechanical and plant construction and the automotive and semiconductor industries and their suppliers. Our customers from other fields such as medical technology and laboratory equipment also value our high quality, innovative products. We take a leading position in the specialised field of vibration isolation, vibration damping and machine setup technology. We are the only provider worldwide that offers the complete range of products and solutions.
Unsurpassed
range of products
Our range of products covers virtually all applications in industry and research: from simple isolation plates to vibration isolation to levelling elements to vibration isolating machine installation and vibration isolating laboratory tables. No matter whether your issue concerns a forging hammer with insulating composite plates or highly sensitive machines with air bearings, there is practically no vibration problem which we cannot solve.
More about Bilz products
We can also find a solution for YOU!
The right vibration technology for your application, whether off-the-shelf or custom made – that is what we do. Our products are only part of the solution. The other part is our staff, who will enthusiastically develop new concepts for you. We promise – together we will find the best way for you!
Have a look at Bilz solutions
The kind of service you need
We are a system supplier and project partner with all-round service: From the problem analysis to the planning phase of a project up to the installation, commissioning and after -sales service – we are a one-stop-shop for you. With our distribution network we offer you competent consultation, service and, of course, vibration isolation worldwide.
Contact Bilz Service
facts and figures
Important information at a glance
Group 10
Made in Germany
The company headquarters of Bilz Vibration Technology AG are located in Leonberg near Stuttgart, in other words in the ‘Ländle’, a region known for its tinkerers and hidden champions. The development, design, manufacture and assembly of our products stays in Germany – resulting in the high quality that you may expect.
Our distribution is worldwide.
Finding distributing partners
Made in Germany
The company headquarters of Bilz Vibration Technology AG are located in Leonberg near Stuttgart, in other words in the ‘Ländle’, a region known for its tinkerers and hidden champions. The development, design, manufacture and assembly of our products stays in Germany – resulting in the high quality that you may expect.
Our distribution is worldwide.
Finding distributing partners
Establishment of the company
1985
Bilz Vibration Technology AG was founded in 1985 under the name ‘Bilz Schwingungstechnik GmbH’ by Dieter Bilz, who thus continued the trade business of his late father, who died at a young age. While still a student, Dieter Bilz already sold isolation pads, levelling elements and wedge mounts. In 1986 the company moves for the first time – to Leonberg.
Worldwide
Since 1989
The first representatives in France, Austria, Switzerland, Taiwan and Korea now also distribute Bilz Schwingungstechnik internationally. In 1990 representation in the USA is added and Bilz is also represented in Italy since 1996. In the year 1995 we move into our current headquarters at the Böblinger Straße 25 in Leonberg.
Stock company
2006
Bilz goes international! In order to better serve the international markets, we renamed and converted our company to a public limited company in 2006. This step was proven to be the right one: Apart from Germany, Asia has become the most important market for Bilz.
Market leader

products.text:
Overview all products for vibration control and vibration solation - Bilz Vibration Technology AG
Search
Contact
Smartdesk
How can we
help you?
Contact our
service department
Menu
Insulation pads
Bilz vibration‑damping insulating pads – the proven and economical solution for a wide range of industrial applications.
Learn more
Levelling elements
Levelling elements are maintenance-free machine feet for vibration-isolated machine installation. Designed specifically for heavy industrial machines, the Bilz machine feet provide the perfect combination of precise level adjustment and isolation from disturbing vibrations.
Learn more
Precision levelling wedges
Bilz levelling wedges for mechanical engineering, industry, and research enable the precise levelling of machines, especially under high loads.
Learn more
Horizontal elements
For machines with high horizontal forces or for lateral linking and fixing.
Learn more
Air springs
Air springs are used for highly effective vibration isolation and structure-borne sound insulation for a wide variety of machine types, optical and electronic devices, laser systems as well as vehicle, engine and transmission test benches.
Learn more
Mechanical level control systems
High-performance level control systems for air spring insulators combined with maximum level consistency.
Learn more
Electronic level control systems
Electronic pneumatic level control systems for combination with BiAir® membrane air springs, for optimum positional accuracy and reduction of deflection and settling times in response to dynamic load changes.
Learn more
Active vibration
isolation
Systems for active vibration isolation with high-performance real-time control in up to 6 degrees of freedom and the highest requirements for insulation effect, settling time and level constancy.
Learn more
Table platforms
Vibration insulating table platforms with integrated air spring in a sturdy metal housing. Optionally available with mechanical-pneumatic level control.
Learn more
Vibration isolated tables
Laboratory tables for the insulation of disturbing ambient vibrations when working on highly sensitive equipment.
Learn more
BILZ PRODUCTS
OUR RANGE – MADE IN GERMANY
Our product range covers almost all applications in industry and research: from simple insulation pads for vibration isolation of your machines to levelling elements for vibration-isolated machine installation or complete foundation isolations. From development, design, engineering, and production to assembly – all our products and solutions are created at our headquarters in Leonberg. We are the only manufacturer worldwide to offer the complete range of products and solutions.
Searching for the
right product?
We are pleased to assist you
We find solutions
Be it automotive, plant engineering or nanotechnology – we find a solution for every industry or any customer requirement.
Discover solutions
